summary: Tested variant selection functionality on /shop/collection/Bluestone. Most features working correctly. Key finding: Color buttons are DISABLED when finish not available (design choice vs requirement mismatch). Size muted/dashed state not testable with Bluestone data.

minor.issue: Two 500 errors in console during page load (unrelated to variant selection)

integration_issues.issue: Colors are DISABLED (opacity-30) when current finish not available, instead of being clickable with auto-switch. Example: Grey+Polished selected → Beige is disabled instead of clickable with auto-switch to Matt
integration_issues.code_location: CollectionDetailPage.js line 1460 - isDisabled check prevents click, but auto-switch useEffect at line 531-536 would work if click was allowed

action_items: DECISION NEEDED: Should colors be clickable when finish not available (with auto-switch) OR disabled (current behavior)?
If auto-switch is required: Remove isDisabled check on color buttons (line 1460) and let useEffect handle finish switching
Size muted/dashed state: Cannot test with Bluestone - need collection with same color having different sizes in different finishes
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1460: `const isDisabled = availableColorsForFinish !== null && !availableColorsForFinish.has(color.name)` - This disables colors when finish not available, preventing auto-switch behavior
Lines 531-536: Auto-switch finish useEffect exists but never triggers because disabled colors can't be clicked
Design decision: Current implementation prevents invalid selections vs allowing click with auto-correction

success_rate.frontend: 85% - 9/11 test cases passed, 2 not testable with Bluestone data

test_credentials: No auth needed for shop pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant selection testing on Bluestone collection. Key findings: (1) Color/Finish/Size selectors work correctly, (2) Cross-filtering works - unavailable options are disabled, (3) Product name updates correctly for all combinations, (4) Size sorting by area is correct, (5) AUTO-SWITCH FINISH: Colors are disabled when finish not available - this may be intentional design or bug depending on requirements, (6) SIZE MUTED STATE: Not testable with Bluestone - Grey has same size (60x60) in both finishes, (7) DESCRIPTION COLOR CHECK: Not testable - Bluestone products have no descriptions. Bluestone variant matrix: (no-color)+Polished→[60x120cm,60x60cm], Beige+Matt→[60x60cm], Grey+Matt→[60x60cm], Grey+Polished→[60x60cm], White+Matt→[30x60cm].

1_variant_selection_appears.details: Color (Beige, Grey, White), Finish (Matt, Polished), Size (30x60cm, 60x60cm, 60x120cm) selectors all appear

2_color_switching.details: Grey and White correctly highlighted with amber ring when selected

3_finish_cross_filter.details: Grey: Both Matt/Polished available. Beige/White: Only Matt available, Polished disabled (bg-gray-50)

4_size_cross_filter.details: Sizes correctly enabled/disabled based on color+finish combination

5_auto_switch_finish.details: Colors are DISABLED when finish not available instead of clickable with auto-switch
5_auto_switch_finish.expected: Grey+Polished → click Beige → finish auto-switches to Matt
5_auto_switch_finish.actual: Beige is disabled (opacity-30) when Polished selected

6_auto_switch_size.details: Size auto-adjusts when color/finish changes (e.g., White→Grey auto-selects 60x60cm)

7_size_three_state.details: Active (amber) and Disabled (gray-50) states work. Muted (dashed) state not observed - no test case in Bluestone data

8_size_click_auto_switch_finish.details: No muted sizes exist in Bluestone collection

9_selected_product_matches.details: Product title/SKU updates correctly: Grey+Matt='Bluestone Grey 60x60', Grey+Polished='Bluestone Grey 60x60 Polished', Beige+Matt='Bluestone Beige 60x60', White+Matt='Bluestone White 30x60'
